signup.title: Join the Jungle
signup.description: Create your Ditto account. Your own private workspace is set up automatically.
signup.email-in-use: An account with this email already exists. Use Log in below instead.
signup.auth0-users-validation: Could not create this account. If you already signed up, use Log in below. Otherwise check your password meets the requirements.
signup.password-too-weak: Your password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with upper/lowercase, a number, and a symbol.
signup.password-policy-not-conformant: Your password does not meet the requirements shown below.
